name: Welcome to SOTE
student: A mission-based first look at the student-operated ecosystem.

name: CEIT 325 Classroom
student: Rows of student workstations that become the entry point into real infrastructure.
focus: Learn the environment and begin the First Signal mission.

name: Mission Control
student: The operator floor for observation, service status, tickets, console access, and daily mission work.

name: Rocket's Forge
student: The teaching datacenter where servers, storage, templates, and services are built.

name: Western Pennsylvania Cyber Defense Command
student: The cyber range space for controlled defense, investigation, recovery, and scenario work.

name: Patch Bay Alpha
student: The security edge staging bay and patching zone for routers, firewalls, and network paths.

name: Rocket's Engineering Bay
student: The hands-on build and R&D area for experiments, staging, parts, and repairs.

name: Technology Cadet Launch Point
student: The visitor can describe the ecosystem and claim the first badge path.
focus: Start as a Technology Cadet and continue into the Student Technology Corps.
